rationale.R1.2: A general review of a technical paper excerpt naturally includes checking whether the logical chain from problem motivation through method design to evaluation results is internally coherent and gap-free.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes specific quantitative claims (14/19 abstentions on the singular subset, 1-ulp accuracy parity on the regular subset) that must be assessed for consistency with the described experimental setup — a plausible load-bearing task if the delegation is technically oriented.
rationale.R1.6: 'Take a look at this paragraph' is a common prompt for writing-level feedback; sentence clarity, paragraph transitions, and exposition quality are equally plausible primary targets under this phrasing.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for feedback on the writing quality and clarity of the text, or on the technical and scientific soundness of the claims, logic, and experimental evidence?
